strategistNote.title: PINS breached stop. GDX opened. BTC trimmed. Smart portfolios carrying the book.
strategistNote.body: Sunday Apr 27 snapshot. PINS at $19.92 — stop breached at $20.00 (-18.5%). Post-COPPA deadline (Apr 22) and Q1 earnings (Apr 23) brought no catalyst. Decide at Monday open: honour stop or hold RSU hedge thesis. BTC leg trimmed: 0.047 @ $87K avg (was 0.056 @ $90.8K) — lower exposure, better avg, still -10.3%. VTI DCA'd to 20.47 sh @ $325. GDX opened at $99.28, currently -5% — gold miners lag bullion. Smart portfolios doing the heavy lifting: BigTech +14%, RenewableEnergy +17%, InTheGame +6.6%. TSM surged +5.2% today, +36% all-time — biggest direct winner. Cash at $1,478.

positions.label: VTI (Total Market ETF)
positions.notes: DCA core. 20.47 sh @ $325.00. SL -8% / TP1 +15% / TP2 +25%. Monthly DCA — TPs reduce, never exit.

positions.label: QQQ (Nasdaq 100 ETF)
positions.notes: Tech recovery play. 2.27 sh @ $607.95. SL -8% / TP1 +20% / TP2 +30%. Reassess if tech leadership breaks.

positions.label: Pinterest (eToro)
positions.notes: ⚠️ STOP BREACHED: $19.92 < SL $20.00. 42.52 sh @ $24.44. Post-COPPA (Apr 22) and Q1 earnings (Apr 23) brought no catalyst. SEPARATE: 1,429 RSU shares at employer broker (not eToro). Decide Monday: honour stop or re-evaluate.

positions.label: Bitcoin
positions.notes: Trimmed from 0.0557 @ $90.8K to 0.0466 @ $87.1K avg. Lower exposure, better avg. SL $70K (~-20%) / TP1 $110K / TP2 $130K. Currently -10.3%.

positions.label: iShares Global Clean Energy ETF
positions.notes: 57.76 sh @ $16.62. +20.2% unrealized. SL $15 / TP1 $22 (+32%) / TP2 $25 (+50%). Trim into strength.

positions.label: Taiwan Semiconductor ADR
positions.notes: 2.10 sh @ $295.14. +36.3% all-time winner, +5.2% today. SL $265 / TP1 $380 (+29%) / TP2 $420 (+42%). Watch Taiwan-China geopolitics.

positions.label: VanEck Gold Miners ETF
positions.notes: NEW: 3.02 sh @ $99.28. Gold miners play alongside GC=F direct gold position. Currently -5%. SL ~$88 (-11%) / TP1 $115 (+16%) / TP2 $130 (+31%). Gold miners lagging bullion — watch for catch-up.

copyPortfolio.note: 7 holdings. Current value $1,993.56 (+$61.68 / +3.2%). Dividend-confirmed: LRCX, Saab AB, Wheaton Precious Metals, GE Vernova, Micron, Royal Gold, Nutrien. Individual cost basis unconfirmed.

closedPositions.reason: Jaynemesis closed remaining MSFT lots Apr 24. Entries from $532 (Oct 2025) and $390 (Mar 2026). Position fully exited.

closedPositions.label: Kongsberg Gruppen (EuropeDefense copier)

closedPositions.reason: Thesis broken — Hormuz ceasefire killed energy risk premium. Clean exit.

closedPositions.label: Gold CFD (20x leverage)
closedPositions.reason: Opened Apr 9 at $4,774. Caught reversal in 3 days. Largest single loss — lesson: no 20x leverage.

closedPositions.label: Netflix (4 lots)
closedPositions.reason: Jaynemesis closed all 4 NFLX lots Apr 16. Combined small profit.

closedPositions.label: Bitcoin residual lot
closedPositions.reason: Tiny 0.000876 BTC lot closed. Re-opened position at $87,059 avg — see active book.

warStatus.description: US-Iran 2-week ceasefire effective April 7 (Trump-brokered). Strait of Hormuz dispute unresolved. XLE closed +20%. War risk premium gone from markets.

actionItems.label: PINS — stop breached at $19.92 (SL: $20.00, -18.5%). Decide Monday open: honour stop or hold RSU hedge thesis.
BTC — at -10.3% ($78K vs $87K avg). SL at $70K. Monitor — hold unless stop approaches.
GDX — new position at -5%. Watch gold price action for miners catch-up confirmation.
Redefine 115K AED deployment triggers — war thesis is dead
Move idle AED to Wio Fixed Saving Space (4% p.a.) if not deploying within 7 days

geopolitical.notes: US-Iran 2-week ceasefire effective April 7. Strait of Hormuz dispute unresolved. Monitor for expiry/escalation.

etoro.notes: Apr 1-25 period P&L: -$786.99. Sunday Apr 27 snapshot: portfolio $39,431.21, unrealized P&L +$1,856.65. Smart portfolios (BigTech +14%, RenewableEnergy +17%) doing heavy lifting.

portfolio.notes: AED 1M goal — Flip target 25%+ net ROI, Hold target 8%+ yield
